source_old_req: The thr_yaw_simulation thread requires that the input parameter angle shall be constrained to the closed interval [-180, 180] degrees. Additionally, the thr_yaw_simulation thread shall ensure that the control logic processing the angle input does not generate excessive or unexpected rudder surface or motor differential commands resulting from angle values outside this range.
natural_requirement: The thr_mgmt component shall define the implementation-level signal routing for thr_mgmt.i. In the implementation layer, thr_mgmt.i shall route signal flow from gps_pos to pspg.gps_pos through R2 and signal flow from pspg.speed to speed through R3.

requirement_items.text: The thr_mgmt.i implementation shall route the signal flow from gps_pos to pspg.gps_pos through connection R2.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The thr_mgmt.i implementation shall declare connection R2 from gps_pos to pspg.gps_pos.

requirement_items.text: The thr_mgmt.i implementation shall route the signal flow from pspg.speed to speed through connection R3.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The thr_mgmt.i implementation shall declare connection R3 from pspg.speed to speed.

quality_policy.traceable: Every item has trace_refs and expected_check metadata tied to AADL facts.
quality_policy.principle: Every generated sentence must name an explicit property assignment or structural connection; ordinary feature declarations are not used as rebuilt requirements.

natural_requirement_before_behavior_styl: The thr_mgmt.i implementation shall declare connection R2 from gps_pos to pspg.gps_pos. The thr_mgmt.i implementation shall declare connection R3 from pspg.speed to speed.

behavior_style_policy.basis: front-110 AGREE-derived requirements favor implementable behavior, constants, assumptions, guarantees, routing, and bounded properties.
behavior_style_policy.rule: Do not describe unsupported validity/legal-boundary semantics unless the AADL model exposes variables, values, or properties that can implement them.

natural_requirement_before_paragraph_rew: The thr_mgmt.i implementation shall route the signal flow from gps_pos to pspg.gps_pos through connection R2. The thr_mgmt.i implementation shall route the signal flow from pspg.speed to speed through connection R3.

paragraph_style_policy.rule: Req.txt is written as a natural-language requirement paragraph; per-item traceability stays in requirement_items.
paragraph_style_policy.basis: Front-110 AGREE-derived requirements generally combine function, assumptions, guarantees, and implementation notes into 1-4 sentence paragraphs.
